geography.data_source: BBMP ward boundaries 2023 for Mahadevapura zone (partial); covers ORR stretch from Silk Board to Marathahalli, Bellandur, HSR Layout, Sarjapur Road

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 ward-level data extrapolated with BBMP 2023 estimates; smallest household size due to young professional and bachelor demographics; fastest population growth corridor in BBMP jurisdiction

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round PLFS adjusted with NASSCOM IT salary data 2023; ORR corridor hosts major tech parks (RMZ Ecoworld, Prestige Tech Park, Embassy Tech Village); informal rate includes construction workers for ongoing development; real estate data from CREDAI Bengaluru 2023

commute_profile.data_source: BMRCL Purple Line Phase 2A (Silk Board-KR Puram ORR line) under construction; extreme traffic congestion on ORR inflates commute time; DULT CMP 2020; ORR signal-free corridor partially complete; cab dominance from Uber/Ola trip data referenced in DULT reports

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Low fare sensitivity and loss aversion — high income tech corridor; very high diffusion speed — young digitally-native workforce; low trust_railways — frustrated by ORR metro construction delays; political mobilisation moderate — migrant tech workers less locally engaged; from Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Lowest clustering in Bengaluru — transient population, new apartment complexes without established community ties; workplace dominates over residential networks; from NASSCOM workforce mobility study 2023 and IHDS-II patterns

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Bellandur commercial area — food courts and retail serving tech parks; BBMP trade license data 2023; high daytime population from office workers
HSR Layout Sector 2 commercial area; BBMP street vendor survey 2022; organic food/retail hub serving HSR and Koramangala residents
Sarjapur Road junction commercial node; BBMP trade license data 2023; serves rapidly growing apartment complexes along Sarjapur Road
Silk Board junction vendor cluster; high transit dependency due to bus interchange; BBMP street vendor survey 2022; serves commuters stuck in traffic

data_source: Composite zone config from Census 2011, NSSO PLFS 78th Round, BMRCL Phase 2A planning docs 2024, DULT CMP 2020, BBMP 2023, NASSCOM 2023, CREDAI Bengaluru 2023, RTO Bangalore Urban 2023
